result.reasoning: From the tool call history, step_1 identifies Gmina Leszno as the administrative district where Szymanówek is located as of July 2023. Step_2 directly states that the fourth letter of the district name "Leszno" is 'z'. The source text presents the letter 'z' in lowercase, so I preserve that exact casing. Applied casing rule: authoritative casing from source.
